ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Market Cap, Dividend Yield) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bank's headquarters */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the bank was established */,
  "parent_company" TEXT /* Name of the parent company (if applicable) */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the bank */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry (e.g., Banking, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry" TEXT /* Name of the parent industry (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the exchange */,
  " Pérez," REAL /* Trading volume of the exchange (in billions) */,
  "listing_fee" REAL /* Listing fee for the exchange (in thousands) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial ratio (e.g., P/E Ratio) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the financial ratio */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the ratio was recorded */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank associated with the ratio */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry associated with the ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_ratios_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor or institution */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., Institutional, Retail) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the investor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  "investment_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., stocks, bonds) */,
  "investment_value" REAL /* Value of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_portfolio_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_industry_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_industry_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_industry_data_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_industry_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
